summary: Read-only review of route drift, owner mismatch, and generated/source divergence.
meaning: Use this pack when an agent must inspect a changed route for drift, stale names, missing owner boundaries, or generated reader mismatch.

notes: May run validators and inspect diffs.
Must return findings or hand off to a workspace-write specialization for fixes.

projection_hints: Suitable for reviewer specializations that inspect without fixing.
Projection may expose read-only git and validation commands.
stop_lines: Do not land fixes through this read-only pack.
Do not treat a review finding as durable memory canon.
